ber:D ayen yessewhamen mi ara iẓer yiwen dakken asawal n Sami rxis

ber:D acu ara tinim deg wass n usamas ay d-yetteddun﹖
ber:D ayen yessewhamen mi ara nẓer dakken imedɣan deg yiḍ i ttilin d urmiden

ber:D acu ara tinim deg wass n lḥedd ay d-yetteddun﹖

ber:D acu ay tgamt tagara n yimalas yezrin﹖
